name: CRA INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: CRA International is a global consulting firm providing economic, financial, and management consulting services. Its services include litigation and regulatory support, expert testimony, strategy development, and performance improvement. The company serves corporate clients, law firms, government agencies, and trade associations.
sellsTo: blockchain, cryptocurrency, and digital assets companies
consumer products, health, and wellness companies

exposures.sentence: Forensic accounting and analysis of complex accounting issues; fraud, corruption, bribery and embezzlement investigations; ... cybercrime, data breach and theft of trade secrets investigations; ...
Our analytical expertise in advanced economic and financial methods is complemented by our in-depth expertise in specific industries, including blockchain, cryptocurrency, and digital assets
identification of business opportunities that could relate to environmental trends; and the economic and business issues surrounding clean and renewable energy
New technologies, such as AI and machine learning, continue to evolve and as a result risks continue to be unknown or uncertain.
